name: RAGLight
desc: RAGLight is a modular framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). It makes it easy to plug in different LLMs, embeddings, and vector stores, and now in…
descFull: RAGLight is a modular framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). It makes it easy to plug in different LLMs, embeddings, and vector stores, and now includes seamless MCP integration to connect external tools and data sources.
